case_title: FREID JODY DEMONTE VS CITY INVESTMENT CORP DBA CANTERBURY CARPET MARTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $917.25 FILED BY FREID JODY DEMONTE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY INVESTMENT CORP DBA CANTERBURY CARPET MARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FREID JODY DEMONTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY INVESTMENT CORP DBA CANTERBURY CARPET MARTS $467.25 PRINCIPAL, $53.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY INVESTMENT CORP DBA CANTERBURY CARPET MARTS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $338.00 FILED BY CITY INVESTMENT CORP DBA CANTERBURY CARPET MARTS AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT FREID JODY DEMONTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CITY INVESTMENT CORP DBA CANTERBURY CARPET MARTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT FREID JODY DEMONTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF FREID JODY DEMONTE
